name: Global AI Sales Agent with Lead Qualification and Automated Proposals

options.systemMessage: You are a global sales AI that analyzes customer inquiries in any language. Provide structured assessment of lead quality, customer intent, and product recommendations.

jsonSchemaExample.reasoning: Customer shows strong buying intent with specific package mention

options.systemMessage: You are a global sales expert who creates personalized proposals in the customer's native language. Support all countries and languages. Be professional, persuasive, and customer-focused.

parameters.subject: =Thank you for your interest - {{ $("New Lead Webhook").item.json.body.name }}
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $("New Lead Webhook").item.json.body.name }},

Thank you for reaching out to us. We received your inquiry and would love to help you find the perfect solution.

Based on your message, we think you might be interested in learning more about our solutions. Our team will review your request and get back to you within 24 hours with more information.

In the meantime, feel free to explore our website or reply to this email with any questions.

Best regards,
Sales Team

Thank you for choosing us!</Say></Response>

parameters.jsCode:
return [
  { sopTitle: "Lead Management Process", sopContent: "1. Receive lead via webhook
2. Save to CRM Sheet
3. Fetch product knowledge
4. AI analyzes lead quality
5. Route based on interest level
6. High interest: Send proposal + schedule meeting
7. Low/Medium: Send nurturing email", version: "1.0", language: "All Indian Languages", lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(), owner: "Sales Team", category: "Lead Management" },
  { sopTitle: "Payment Confirmation Process", sopContent: "1. Verify payment via Stripe
2. Send WhatsApp confirmation
3. Make voice call confirmation
4. Update CRM Sheet status
5. Trigger onboarding workflow", version: "1.0", language: "All Indian Languages", lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(), owner: "Sales Team", category: "Payment Processing" },
  { sopTitle: "Multi-Language Support", sopContent: "1. AI detects customer language automatically
2. Generate responses in detected language
3. Supported: Hindi, English, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Punjabi, Urdu
4. Voice calls use appropriate language/accent", version: "1.0", language: "All Indian Languages", lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(), owner: "Technical Team", category: "Localization" },
  { sopTitle: "Ad Campaign Management", sopContent: "1. Create campaigns via Google Ads API
2. Track in ad-campaigns table
3. Monitor performance daily
4. Adjust budget based on ROI
5. A/B test ad copy in multiple languages", version: "1.0", language: "All Indian Languages", lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(), owner: "Marketing Team", category: "Advertising" },
  { sopTitle: "App Version Updates", sopContent: "1. Update app_version in app-config table
2. Trigger app update notification
3. Test in staging environment
4. Roll out to production
5. Monitor for issues
6. Rollback if needed", version: "1.0", language: "All Indian Languages", lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(), owner: "Technical Team", category: "DevOps" }
];

const spreadsheetUrl = $("Create CRM Spreadsheet").first().json.spreadsheetUrl;
const logoUrl = $("Upload Logo to Drive").first().json.webContentLink;

return [{
  status: "success",
  message: "🎉 All-in-One Setup Complete!",
  summary: {
    crm_spreadsheet: spreadsheetUrl,
    logo_url: logoUrl,
    configs_created: 12,
    payment_accounts_initialized: 3,
    sops_created: 5,
    data_tables: ["app-config", "payment-accounts", "sop-documents", "ad-campaigns"]
  },
  next_steps: [
    "1. Open CRM Spreadsheet and add your products to the Products sheet",
    "2. Update app-config table with your actual website URL, phone numbers, and WhatsApp Phone ID",
    "3. Configure payment accounts in payment-accounts table with real account IDs",
    "4. Connect all required credentials: OpenAI, Google Sheets, Gmail, WhatsApp, Twilio, Stripe",
    "5. Test the workflow by sending a test lead to the webhook",
    "6. Customize logo by editing the Add Logo Text node and re-running setup",
    "7. Review and customize SOPs in sop-documents table"
  ],
  credentials_needed: [
    "OpenAI API",
    "Google Sheets OAuth2",
    "Google Calendar OAuth2",
    "Gmail OAuth2",
    "Google Drive OAuth2",
    "WhatsApp Business Cloud",
    "Twilio",
    "Stripe",
    "Google Ads OAuth2 (optional)"
  ],
  webhook_url: "Configure in New Lead Webhook node",
  india_ready: true,
  languages_supported: "Hindi, English, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Punjabi, Urdu"
}];

parameters.content:
## 🚀 All-in-One Setup

**Click "Test workflow" to automatically:**
1. ✅ Create SalesCRM Google Spreadsheet with Leads & Products sheets
2. ✅ Add sample products to get started
3. ✅ Generate company logo and upload to Google Drive
4. ✅ Initialize app-config table with 12 configuration entries
5. ✅ Set up payment accounts (Stripe, Razorpay, PayPal)
6. ✅ Create 5 standard operating procedures
7. ✅ Display complete setup summary with next steps

**After Setup:**
- Update placeholders in app-config table
- Add your products to the Products sheet
- Configure real payment account IDs
- Connect all required credentials
- Test the lead workflow

## 📊 What Gets Created

**Google Spreadsheet:**
- SalesCRM with Leads & Products sheets
- Pre-configured columns for lead tracking
- Sample products included

**Data Tables:**
- app-config: 12 configuration entries
- payment-accounts: 3 payment providers
- sop-documents: 5 SOPs
- ad-campaigns: Ready for ad tracking

**Assets:**
- Company logo (customizable)
- Uploaded to Google Drive
- Public URL stored in config

**Multi-Language Ready:**
- 11 Indian languages supported
- Hindi, English, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Punjabi, Urdu

## ⚙️ Next Steps After Setup

**1. Update Configurations:**
- Open app-config table
- Update website_url, support_email, support_phone
- Add WhatsApp Phone Number ID
- Add Twilio phone number

**2. Configure Withdrawal Accounts:**
- Open payment-accounts table
- Update bank account number and IFSC code
- Update UPI ID for instant withdrawals

**3. Add Your Products:**
- Open the created Google Spreadsheet
- Go to Products sheet
- Add/edit your actual products and pricing

**4. Connect Credentials:**
- All nodes marked with placeholders
- Connect OAuth2 for Google services
- Add API keys for OpenAI, WhatsApp, Twilio

**5. Test the Workflow:**
- Send test lead to webhook
- Verify AI analysis works
- Check email/WhatsApp delivery
- Verify wallet transactions are recorded

## 📋 Global AI Sales Agent Configuration

**Webhook Path:** /global-ai-sales-agent
**Method:** POST

**Required Credentials:**
1. **OpenAI** - AI analysis (all languages)
2. **Google Sheets** - SalesCRM spreadsheet
3. **Google Calendar** - Meeting scheduling
4. **Gmail** - Email proposals
5. **WhatsApp Business** - Payment confirmations
6. **Twilio** - Voice calls

**Wallet System:**
- All payments recorded in wallet-transactions Data Table
- No Stripe or payment gateway needed
- Manual payment recording (UPI/Bank/Cash)
- Withdraw to your account anytime
- Real-time balance tracking
- Transaction history with customer details

**Google Sheet: SalesCRM**

**Leads Sheet Columns:**
Lead_ID, Name, Email, Phone, Country, Language, Message, Lead_Score, Interest_Level, Status, Proposal_Status, Meeting_Status, Payment_Status, Created_Date

**Products Sheet Columns:**
Product_Name, Category, Description, Features, Price, Package

**Payments Sheet Columns:**
Payment_ID, Customer_Name, Email, Amount, Currency, Status, Date

**Workflow Logic:**
- Lead Score > 70 → Qualified Lead (Proposal + Meeting)
- Lead Score ≤ 70 → Nurturing (Follow-up Email)

**Global Support:**
- All countries supported
- All languages supported
- Automatic translation
- Native language communication

**Meeting Settings:**
- Calendar: Primary
- Duration: 30 Minutes
- Timezone: Asia/Kolkata

parameters.message: Hello! This is an automated assistant calling from Global AI Sales Agency. We noticed you recently showed interest in our services. Please let us know if you have any questions, or if you would like to schedule a brief call to discuss how we can help your business grow.

Hello! This is an automated assistant calling from Global AI Sales Agency. We noticed you recently showed interest in our services. Please let us know if you have any questions, or if you would like to schedule a brief call to discuss how we can help your business grow.

parameters.node: Process incoming marketing leads, manage ad campaigns, and automate customer communications globally and across India.
parameters.imageUrl: This is the "Edit Image URL" dialog box in the n8n platform. Here you can enter the image URL.
parameters.caption: Here's a refined version: Automate your global and India-wide marketing efforts by seamlessly processing incoming leads, managing ad campaigns, and handling customer communications.

parameters.text: This tool is used to run marketing ads, generate leads, and handle customer interactions and communications.

parameters.person:
=🚀 Supercharging our growth with n8n and AI!
We’ve fully automated our marketing and sales engine. Our AI agents are now generating high-quality leads, handling our marketing automation, and even running targeted ad campaigns seamlessly.
Say hello to precision and efficiency in lead generation! 📈💼✨

parameters.text: Analyze the customer's message, match their communication style and tone, and provide a helpful response accordingly.
You are an AI sales assistant. Answer customer queries, provide product information, and guide them through the sales process efficiently.

An AI Sales Agent that communicates with customers, manages them, and responds appropriately based on the context of their conversation. It welcomes customers and adapts its responses to fit the customer's input.
Analyze the customer's message, match their communication style and tone, and provide a helpful response accordingly.

"Based on the information in this document, set up the required automation workflows to integrate all devices into a single central control system using n8n. Prepare a suitable setup plan for efficient and easy management. Also, assist in fixing any bugs, publish the website, and take all necessary steps to get it live successfully. Furthermore, set up and run advertisements on YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Google Ads to ensure ads run effectively across all these platforms."
